title: AAProxy
description: Mod to allow AATool to work with multiplayer, purely client side.
body:
Proxy to let [AATool](https://github.com/DarwinBaker/AATool) work with multiplayer servers, without requiring direct server access. 

**NOT SPEEDRUN LB COMPLIANT**

# Setting up with AATool
- When you join a server, you will get a message in chat telling you that the proxy is running, with a copyable link to the folder.
  
  ![clickable text in chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OrPmMrPW/images/f816fc4fc348392da52cb9e3b8ca1177005e3084.png)
- Paste that location into the 'Track Specific World' Setting in AATool
  
  ![AATool setting location](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OrPmMrPW/images/f393a45c038a682438512d2eb17ea1c78c5a614c.png)
- If tracking successfully, you will see the following:
  
  ![AATool bottom indicator showing "Tracking: 'aaproxy'"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OrPmMrPW/images/2a174d9d5ea2eb33accc598b0b501a626f689d0b.png)

**You only need to do this one time; on the first server you join.**

## Config
- Enable / disable the proxy with F6 (rebindable in controls)
- Or in Mod menu config screen
  ![Mod menu config options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OrPmMrPW/images/9bf9b9b2f8f645ce257072db79fc93e8a86ae885.png)
